records.m_Talk_ENG: A-amazing...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-amazing...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-amazing...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: From outside it looked like a crumbling ruin, but the inside is intact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From outside it looked like a crumbling ruin, but the inside is intact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From outside it looked like a crumbling ruin, but the inside is intact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kind of plain, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kind of plain, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kind of plain, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I heard Golden Vale ruins, I expected something flashy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I heard Golden Vale ruins, I expected something flashy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I heard Golden Vale ruins, I expected something flashy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look closer, Indiana G.A.P.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look closer, Indiana G.A.P.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look closer, Indiana G.A.P.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The walls are covered in Golden Vale moss. If touched with blood, it will gleam gold.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The walls are covered in Golden Vale moss. If touched with blood, it will gleam gold.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The walls are covered in Golden Vale moss. If touched with blood, it will gleam gold.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I devoted my life to studying the legend of the Golden Vale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I devoted my life to studying the legend of the Golden Vale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I devoted my life to studying the legend of the Golden Vale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I vouch for it. This is truly the legendary Golden Vale ruin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I vouch for it. This is truly the legendary Golden Vale ruin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I vouch for it. This is truly the legendary Golden Vale ruin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what in the world is this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what in the world is this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what in the world is this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's Eternium! I've never seen this much before!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's Eternium! I've never seen this much before!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's Eternium! I've never seen this much before!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, all these luxurious relics! What could they be used for?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, all these luxurious relics! What could they be used for?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, all these luxurious relics! What could they be used for?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Robin, don't touch anything. Something doesn't feel right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Robin, don't touch anything. Something doesn't feel right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Robin, don't touch anything. Something doesn't feel right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old man, don't you feel something off about this place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old man, don't you feel something off about this place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old man, don't you feel something off about this place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You feel it too. I was thinking the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You feel it too. I was thinking the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You feel it too. I was thinking the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to Administration protocol, there's a strict limit on how much Eternium can be stored in one place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to Administration protocol, there's a strict limit on how much Eternium can be stored in one place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to Administration protocol, there's a strict limit on how much Eternium can be stored in one place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too much Eternium dissolves the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too much Eternium dissolves the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too much Eternium dissolves the dimension surface.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this much, the dimension should've melted down already.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this much, the dimension should've melted down already.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this much, the dimension should've melted down already.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something must be forcibly holding this ruin in place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something must be forcibly holding this ruin in place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something must be forcibly holding this ruin in place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-now that you say that, it feels eerie...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-now that you say that, it feels eerie...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-now that you say that, it feels eerie...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly. Eerie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly. Eerie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly. Eerie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's felt wrong since we walked in, like someone's will is bound to the space itself...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's felt wrong since we walked in, like someone's will is bound to the space itself...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's felt wrong since we walked in, like someone's will is bound to the space itself...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It feels almost like a Counter's CRF...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It feels almost like a Counter's CRF...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It feels almost like a Counter's CRF...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "That's right. Normally, this ruin couldn't exist at all."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "That's right. Normally, this ruin couldn't exist at all."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "That's right. Normally, this ruin couldn't exist at all."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "One person's will has been preserving it all this time."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "One person's will has been preserving it all this time."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "One person's will has been preserving it all this time."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Waiting desperately for someone to finally find it."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Waiting desperately for someone to finally find it."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Waiting desperately for someone to finally find it."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "And that person guided me here."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "And that person guided me here."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "And that person guided me here."

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says, her voice tinging with sorrow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says, her voice tinging with sorrow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says, her voice tinging with sorrow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're saying someone's guarding this ruin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're saying someone's guarding this ruin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're saying someone's guarding this ruin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No way. This is a Counterside ruin. No human could live here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way. This is a Counterside ruin. No human could live here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way. This is a Counterside ruin. No human could live here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, then where is this "someone"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, then where is this "someone"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, then where is this "someone"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That person is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That person is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That person is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-Lady Sita? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-Lady Sita? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-Lady Sita? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That person is right beneath your feet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That person is right beneath your feet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That person is right beneath your feet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beneath our... feet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Beneath our... feet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Beneath our... feet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that... a skeleton...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that... a skeleton...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that... a skeleton...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This skeleton is what's been guarding the ruin...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This skeleton is what's been guarding the ruin...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This skeleton is what's been guarding the ruin...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: At last, everything makes sense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At last, everything makes sense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At last, everything makes sense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must be the remains of one who once protected this place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must be the remains of one who once protected this place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must be the remains of one who once protected this place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even in death, their will lingered in their remains, sustaining this space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even in death, their will lingered in their remains, sustaining this space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even in death, their will lingered in their remains, sustaining this space.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That will... a force that makes possibility into reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That will... a force that makes possibility into reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That will... a force that makes possibility into reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Much like a Counter's CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Much like a Counter's CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Much like a Counter's CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then this person kept their Counter ability even in death?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then this person kept their Counter ability even in death?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then this person kept their Counter ability even in death?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that CRF is what sustains the ruin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that CRF is what sustains the ruin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that CRF is what sustains the ruin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The unique Corruption ray twisted its body into something Artifact-like.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The unique Corruption ray twisted its body into something Artifact-like.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The unique Corruption ray twisted its body into something Artifact-like.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even so, that person refused to let go. Not even in death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even so, that person refused to let go. Not even in death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even so, that person refused to let go. Not even in death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They preserved it for the descendant who would inherit the Golden Vale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They preserved it for the descendant who would inherit the Golden Vale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They preserved it for the descendant who would inherit the Golden Vale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A descendant?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A descendant?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A descendant?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The natives of the Amazon basin. And those still living on the floating islands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The natives of the Amazon basin. And those still living on the floating islands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The natives of the Amazon basin. And those still living on the floating islands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their ancestors may have been <color=#ffd34c>Exiles</color> from another world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their ancestors may have been <color=#ffd34c>Exiles</color> from another world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their ancestors may have been <color=#ffd34c>Exiles</color> from another world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps their world fell to the same kind of disaster we now face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps their world fell to the same kind of disaster we now face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps their world fell to the same kind of disaster we now face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So they left behind the Golden Vale legend as a warning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So they left behind the Golden Vale legend as a warning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So they left behind the Golden Vale legend as a warning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sita, you are the true heir of the Golden Vale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sita, you are the true heir of the Golden Vale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sita, you are the true heir of the Golden Vale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And my role was to guide you here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And my role was to guide you here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And my role was to guide you here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Looking back, it was all fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Looking back, it was all fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Looking back, it was all fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My life spent chasing the Golden Vale, all to lead me to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My life spent chasing the Golden Vale, all to lead me to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My life spent chasing the Golden Vale, all to lead me to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather...

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as you said... every Artifact carries history.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as you said... every Artifact carries history.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as you said... every Artifact carries history.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if anything here can protect people from the coming disaster...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if anything here can protect people from the coming disaster...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if anything here can protect people from the coming disaster...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must be this very skeleton.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must be this very skeleton.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must be this very skeleton.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This skeleton is the true <color=#ffd34c>Legacy of the Golden Vale</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This skeleton is the true <color=#ffd34c>Legacy of the Golden Vale</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This skeleton is the true <color=#ffd34c>Legacy of the Golden Vale</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Well said, Sita.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Well said, Sita.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Well said, Sita.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! I was thinking the exact same thing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! I was thinking the exact same thing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! I was thinking the exact same thing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I agree too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I agree too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I agree too!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
All right, we've got the Legacy. Time to head back to the Administration
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
All right, we've got the Legacy. Time to head back to the Administration
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
All right, we've got the Legacy. Time to head back to the Administration
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This tremor... Is it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This tremor... Is it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This tremor... Is it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Demolition Worm...! Was it drawn to the Eternium in the ruins?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Demolition Worm...! Was it drawn to the Eternium in the ruins?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Demolition Worm...! Was it drawn to the Eternium in the ruins?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you all waiting for...?! If we stay, we're dead! Let's get outta here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you all waiting for...?! If we stay, we're dead! Let's get outta here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you all waiting for...?! If we stay, we're dead! Let's get outta here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: These big worms are tougher than cockroaches!
records.m_Talk_DEU: These big worms are tougher than cockroaches!
records.m_Talk_FRA: These big worms are tougher than cockroaches!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Smaller C.O.s are still chasing us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Smaller C.O.s are still chasing us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Smaller C.O.s are still chasing us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Artifact Sita's carrying! That's what's drawing them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Artifact Sita's carrying! That's what's drawing them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Artifact Sita's carrying! That's what's drawing them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! Maybe we should just ditch it...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! Maybe we should just ditch it...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! Maybe we should just ditch it...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Absolutely not! That defeats our entire purpose!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Absolutely not! That defeats our entire purpose!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Absolutely not! That defeats our entire purpose!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without that relic, even more people will die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without that relic, even more people will die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without that relic, even more people will die!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was kidding! It was a joke!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was kidding! It was a joke!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was kidding! It was a joke!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Wait... Where's Sita...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Wait... Where's Sita...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Wait... Where's Sita...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sita! Get out of there...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sita! Get out of there...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sita! Get out of there...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: G-Grandfather...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: G-Grandfather...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: G-Grandfather...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't good. If we're stuck here we're finished!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't good. If we're stuck here we're finished!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't good. If we're stuck here we're finished!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Robin! Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Robin! Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Robin! Are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember! Right now it's just you and me who can fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember! Right now it's just you and me who can fight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember! Right now it's just you and me who can fight!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I'll hold them here, so you
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I'll hold them here, so you
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I'll hold them here, so you
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, Ms. Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, Ms. Mi Rinae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, Ms. Mi Rinae.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll use Aurafication to buy time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll use Aurafication to buy time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll use Aurafication to buy time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please evacuate everyone to safety.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please evacuate everyone to safety.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please evacuate everyone to safety.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll regroup at the extraction point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll regroup at the extraction point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll regroup at the extraction point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your eyes... they've changed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your eyes... they've changed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your eyes... they've changed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine then, let's do this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine then, let's do this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine then, let's do this!

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's felt wrong since we walked in, like someone's will is bound to the space itself...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It feels almost like a Counter's CRF...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It feels almost like a Counter's CRF...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It feels almost like a Counter's CRF...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: "That's right. Normally, this ruin couldn't exist at all."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "That's right. Normally, this ruin couldn't exist at all."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "That's right. Normally, this ruin couldn't exist at all."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "One person's will has been preserving it all this time."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "One person's will has been preserving it all this time."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "One person's will has been preserving it all this time."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Waiting desperately for someone to finally find it."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Waiting desperately for someone to finally find it."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Waiting desperately for someone to finally find it."

root.m_Talk_ENG: "And that person guided me here."
root.m_Talk_DEU: "And that person guided me here."
root.m_Talk_FRA: "And that person guided me here."

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...is what Lady Sita says, her voice tinging with sorrow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...is what Lady Sita says, her voice tinging with sorrow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...is what Lady Sita says, her voice tinging with sorrow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're saying someone's guarding this ruin?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're saying someone's guarding this ruin?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're saying someone's guarding this ruin?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No way. This is a Counterside ruin. No human could live here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No way. This is a Counterside ruin. No human could live here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No way. This is a Counterside ruin. No human could live here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, then where is this "someone"?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, then where is this "someone"?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, then where is this "someone"?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That person is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That person is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That person is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-Lady Sita? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-Lady Sita? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-Lady Sita? What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That person is right beneath your feet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That person is right beneath your feet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That person is right beneath your feet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Beneath our... feet?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Beneath our... feet?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Beneath our... feet?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that... a skeleton...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that... a skeleton...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that... a skeleton...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This skeleton is what's been guarding the ruin...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This skeleton is what's been guarding the ruin...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This skeleton is what's been guarding the ruin...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: At last, everything makes sense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At last, everything makes sense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At last, everything makes sense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It must be the remains of one who once protected this place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It must be the remains of one who once protected this place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It must be the remains of one who once protected this place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even in death, their will lingered in their remains, sustaining this space.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even in death, their will lingered in their remains, sustaining this space.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even in death, their will lingered in their remains, sustaining this space.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That will... a force that makes possibility into reality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That will... a force that makes possibility into reality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That will... a force that makes possibility into reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Much like a Counter's CRF.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Much like a Counter's CRF.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Much like a Counter's CRF.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then this person kept their Counter ability even in death?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then this person kept their Counter ability even in death?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then this person kept their Counter ability even in death?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that CRF is what sustains the ruin?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that CRF is what sustains the ruin?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that CRF is what sustains the ruin?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The unique Corruption ray twisted its body into something Artifact-like.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The unique Corruption ray twisted its body into something Artifact-like.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The unique Corruption ray twisted its body into something Artifact-like.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even so, that person refused to let go. Not even in death.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even so, that person refused to let go. Not even in death.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even so, that person refused to let go. Not even in death.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They preserved it for the descendant who would inherit the Golden Vale.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They preserved it for the descendant who would inherit the Golden Vale.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They preserved it for the descendant who would inherit the Golden Vale.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A descendant?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A descendant?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A descendant?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The natives of the Amazon basin. And those still living on the floating islands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The natives of the Amazon basin. And those still living on the floating islands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The natives of the Amazon basin. And those still living on the floating islands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Their ancestors may have been <color=#ffd34c>Exiles</color> from another world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Their ancestors may have been <color=#ffd34c>Exiles</color> from another world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Their ancestors may have been <color=#ffd34c>Exiles</color> from another world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps their world fell to the same kind of disaster we now face.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps their world fell to the same kind of disaster we now face.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps their world fell to the same kind of disaster we now face.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So they left behind the Golden Vale legend as a warning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So they left behind the Golden Vale legend as a warning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So they left behind the Golden Vale legend as a warning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sita, you are the true heir of the Golden Vale.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sita, you are the true heir of the Golden Vale.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sita, you are the true heir of the Golden Vale.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And my role was to guide you here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And my role was to guide you here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And my role was to guide you here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Looking back, it was all fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Looking back, it was all fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Looking back, it was all fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My life spent chasing the Golden Vale, all to lead me to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My life spent chasing the Golden Vale, all to lead me to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My life spent chasing the Golden Vale, all to lead me to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather...

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as you said... every Artifact carries history.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as you said... every Artifact carries history.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as you said... every Artifact carries history.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if anything here can protect people from the coming disaster...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if anything here can protect people from the coming disaster...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if anything here can protect people from the coming disaster...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It must be this very skeleton.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It must be this very skeleton.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It must be this very skeleton.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This skeleton is the true <color=#ffd34c>Legacy of the Golden Vale</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This skeleton is the true <color=#ffd34c>Legacy of the Golden Vale</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This skeleton is the true <color=#ffd34c>Legacy of the Golden Vale</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... Well said, Sita.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... Well said, Sita.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... Well said, Sita.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! I was thinking the exact same thing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! I was thinking the exact same thing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! I was thinking the exact same thing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I agree too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I agree too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I agree too!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
All right, we've got the Legacy. Time to head back to the Administration
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
All right, we've got the Legacy. Time to head back to the Administration
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
All right, we've got the Legacy. Time to head back to the Administration
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This tremor... Is it...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This tremor... Is it...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This tremor... Is it...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Demolition Worm...! Was it drawn to the Eternium in the ruins?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Demolition Worm...! Was it drawn to the Eternium in the ruins?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Demolition Worm...! Was it drawn to the Eternium in the ruins?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you all waiting for...?! If we stay, we're dead! Let's get outta here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you all waiting for...?! If we stay, we're dead! Let's get outta here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you all waiting for...?! If we stay, we're dead! Let's get outta here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: These big worms are tougher than cockroaches!
root.m_Talk_DEU: These big worms are tougher than cockroaches!
root.m_Talk_FRA: These big worms are tougher than cockroaches!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Smaller C.O.s are still chasing us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Smaller C.O.s are still chasing us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Smaller C.O.s are still chasing us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Artifact Sita's carrying! That's what's drawing them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Artifact Sita's carrying! That's what's drawing them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Artifact Sita's carrying! That's what's drawing them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! Maybe we should just ditch it...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! Maybe we should just ditch it...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! Maybe we should just ditch it...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Absolutely not! That defeats our entire purpose!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Absolutely not! That defeats our entire purpose!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Absolutely not! That defeats our entire purpose!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without that relic, even more people will die!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without that relic, even more people will die!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without that relic, even more people will die!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was kidding! It was a joke!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was kidding! It was a joke!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was kidding! It was a joke!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Wait... Where's Sita...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Wait... Where's Sita...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Wait... Where's Sita...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sita! Get out of there...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sita! Get out of there...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sita! Get out of there...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: G-Grandfather...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: G-Grandfather...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: G-Grandfather...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't good. If we're stuck here we're finished!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't good. If we're stuck here we're finished!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't good. If we're stuck here we're finished!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Robin! Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Robin! Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Robin! Are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Remember! Right now it's just you and me who can fight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Remember! Right now it's just you and me who can fight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Remember! Right now it's just you and me who can fight!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I'll hold them here, so you
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I'll hold them here, so you
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I'll hold them here, so you
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, Ms. Mi Rinae.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, Ms. Mi Rinae.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, Ms. Mi Rinae.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll use Aurafication to buy time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll use Aurafication to buy time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll use Aurafication to buy time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please evacuate everyone to safety.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please evacuate everyone to safety.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please evacuate everyone to safety.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll regroup at the extraction point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll regroup at the extraction point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll regroup at the extraction point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your eyes... they've changed!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your eyes... they've changed!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your eyes... they've changed!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine then, let's do this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine then, let's do this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine then, let's do this!
